title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from an Entertainment Editor
text: Editor Philip Mutz predicts that Sinners will win Best Motion Picture, Drama at the 2026 Golden Globes. The nominees are: Frankenstein, Hamnet, It Was Just an Accident, The Secret Agent, Sentimental Value, and Sinners. Mutz identifies Sinners as his choice, describing it as his favorite film of 2025. He notes the film, helmed by Ryan Coogler and starring Michael B. Jordan, follows two brothers who return to Mississippi to open a juke joint. Mutz explains that while the story initially appears to be a period drama, it takes a genre-bending turn with a series of tense and thrilling twists. He characterizes it as blending multiple tones—scary, sexy, thrilling, hilarious—while being rich with meaning and metaphors, pointing to its impressive 97% rating on Rotten Tomatoes as evidence of widespread acclaim.
